_comment: Tier-2 for fenics helmholtz#: regression armor for the 3 phantom-physics closures (helmholtz + maxwell + nearly_incompressible_elasticity). The fenics catalog declared these in supported_physics() with rich deep_knowledge but had no generator dispatch — generate_input() raised ValueError. Generators landed in commit c5d184a (helmholtz + maxwell) and the same commit family for nearly_incomp. This fixture pins: (a) all 3 produce >=800 char templates, (b) helmholtz uses basix.ufl + dirichletbc + a direct/lu solver, (c) maxwell uses basix.ElementFamily.N1E (Nédélec H(curl), NOT Lagrange) + ufl.curl, (d) nearly_incomp uses basix.ufl.mixed_element + the (1/lambda) saddle-point stabilization + Taylor-Hood P2-vector P1-scalar pair (shape=(gdim,)), (e) NONE of the templates re-introduce the removed ufl.{FiniteElement, VectorElement, MixedElement, TensorElement} classes. Verified empirically against dolfinx 0.10.0 / basix 0.10.0 / ufl 2025.2.1 on 2026-06-01.
